message:
test: add 13 proptest properties for connector event model conversion functions

Expand proptest_connector_event_model.rs from 47 to 60 tests with new
coverage for from_inbound_signal and from_outbound_action converters:

Inbound signal conversion (8 tests):
- Direction is always Inbound with correct connector_id and timestamp
- Event type starts with "inbound." and contains signal kind
- Failure signals map to Critical severity
- Correlation ID, pane ID, lifecycle phase, failure class all preserved
- Payload content preserved through conversion

Outbound action conversion (5 tests):
- Direction is always Outbound with correct connector and timestamp
- Event type starts with "outbound." and contains action kind
- Pane ID and workflow ID preserved from source event
- Severity mapping preserves OutboundSeverity rank

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
